{{CargoRelic
|name=Cathay Landscape
|class_id=20176
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This is a painting by the Cathay traveler Xu Xiake. He is not famous as a painter, but he enjoys traveling and is passionate about geography, and this painting was created during his journey. It is a treasure with a high geographical value.
|fame=14
|art=32
|fth=13
|civ=15
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per new Realm entered, Snail ATK +8<br>Realms Reached: 8/8
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per new Realm entered, Snail ATK +16<br>Realms Reached: 8/8
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per new Realm entered, Snail ATK +24<br>Realms Reached: 8/8
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per new Realm entered, Snail ATK +24<br>Realms Reached: 8/8
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per new Realm entered, Snail ATK +24<br>Realms Reached: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
